koi_net.components.profile_monitor

Classes

ProfileMonitor(log, kobj_queue, identity)

Processes changes to node profile in the config.
class koi_net.components.profile_monitor.ProfileMonitor(log, kobj_queue, identity)[source]

Bases: object

Processes changes to node profile in the config.

Parameters:

  • log (Logger)

  • kobj_queue (KobjQueue)

  • identity (NodeIdentity)
